Sign in to ND as User A on the main testing device, and User B on secondary device 2. As User A, create a workspace, add User B as a member 3. As User B, navigate to the workspace chat 4. If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** v9.3.51-1 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://test-management.browserstack.com/projects/2219752/test-runs/TR-14595/folder/13176706/44011822/1295551573 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** applausetester+ccardfeed@applause.expensifail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Exploratory - Significant User Experience Deterioration **Device used:** Windows 11 / Chrome **App Component:** Chat Report View ## Action Performed: Preconditions: log out if already logged in, then log in to applausetester+ccardfeed@applause.expensifail.com account Steps: 1. Navigate to Reports tab 2. Click on "Unapproved card" option in "Monthly accrual" section 3. Note that the card Feed pill is auto selected to American Express 4. Click on the card transaction, note that the transaction doesn't display correctly 5. Click on the Feed pill 6. Unselect then select the "American Express" option again, then click "apply" button 7. Click the card transaction expense again, note that the transaction now display correctly 8. Click "arrow" on the card transaction to open the expense details ## Expected Result: - in step 4, the card transaction should be displayed correctly under each column (e.g receipt, type, date, merchant, and total) without unselect and select the Feed pill - in step 8, the expense details should be opened when user click "arrow" on the displayed card transaction ## Actual Result: - in step 4, the card transaction doesn't display correctly - in step 8, clicking "arrow" on the card transaction doesn't lead to the expense details ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1337f0a6-22d7-4ac6-92dd-6b56e8cfedb8 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

Cancel steps: Go to http://travel.expensify.com/ Go to Hamburger menu > Trips > Tap on the Upcoming trip > Cancel 1. Go to https://staging.new.expensify.com/ 2. Go to travel workspace in which you have canceled trip 3. Verify you see "Canceled" badge next to canceled actions 4. Go to Trip details 5. Verify you see "Canceled" badge 6. Go to Home page 7. Verify you see "Canceled" badge in canceled trip ## Expected Result: The new "Canceled" badge is displayed in the Home page, the trip details page, and in the travel workspace. ## Actual Result: The trip is not displayed from the Home page or the trip details page. The trip preview is displayed in the travel workspace, but not the canceled trip. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/30d382cb-8651-4336-8ee0-75fdeab452cd [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** v9.3.51-1 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/86505 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** applausetester+ck33126@applause.expensifail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Pull Request QA execution **Device used:** Windows 11/Chrome **App Component:** Money Requests ## Action Performed: Prerequisite: 1. Create new expensifail account 2. Have a default workspace with distance rate enabled 3. Have odometer beta Steps: 1. Navigate to staging.new.expensify.com 2. Press the global create button > Create expense > Manual 3. Enter any amount and go next 4. Observe it goes to the confirm details page 5. Go back and switch to Scan 6. Add an image and go next 7. Observe it goes to the confirm details page 8. Close the RHP 9. Press the global create button > Track distance > Map 10. Enter any waypoints and go next 11. Observe it goes to the confirm details page 12. Go back and switch to Manual 13. Enter any amount and go next 14. Observe it goes to the confirm details page 15. Go back and switch to Odometer 16. Enter any amount and go next 17. Observe it goes to the confirm details page ## Expected Result: On steps 4, 7, 11, 14, 17 - Participant page should open ## Actual Result: On steps 4, 7, 11, 14, 17 - Confirm details page opens instead of participant page ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/64bbc2a7-416f-4015-a4cb-6fd362fcfd6e [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
